items.name: ingress_bytes
items.func: SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 0 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 1 THEN SRC2DST_BYTES ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 1 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 0 THEN DST2SRC_BYTES ELSE 0 END)

items.name: egress_bytes
items.func: SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 1 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 0 THEN SRC2DST_BYTES ELSE 0 END) + SUM(CASE WHEN CLIENT_LOCATION = 0 AND SERVER_LOCATION = 1 THEN DST2SRC_BYTES ELSE 0 END)
